case_title: J & J SHEET METAL, INC. VS. ANSELMO REVELO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-10-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S).
